summary: Created modernized traditional interior designs for property_002 with layered lighting, decorative pillows and throws on sofa, area rug defining seating area, potted plants adding natural elements, decorative art pieces above sofa and near dining area, and decorative trays/vases/sculptures on tables for the living room, and decorative tiling or wallpaper on walls, vanity or cabinet for storage, under-cabinet lighting, small potted plant, and decorative mirror or artwork above sink for the bathroom.
